---
title: about
toc: false
---

if youre not a bot, write me at [*hi [at] mdwm [dot] org*   ](mailto:) or go to [my main website](https://martenw.com)

**what does mdwm mean?**: nothing! it was just a cool domain that was not yet taken. in my mind, it resembles a bit a museum's name (think [MoMA](moma.org), [MdbK](mdbk.de), [MOCAK](mocak.pl), ...)

**nerdy stuff**: this site is built using [hugo](https://gohugo.io) and the [typo theme](https://tomfran.github.io/typo-wiki/).
